---
title: "Eva's #30DayChartChallenge"
---

# 2025

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Day 3: Circles](../2025/plots/03-Circles.png){group="2025-gallery" height="500"}

![Day 5: Ranking](../2025/plots/05-Ranking-Percentage.png){group="2025-gallery" height="500"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![Day 12: data.gov](../2025/plots/12-data-gov.png){group="2025-gallery" height="500"}

![Day 20: Urbanization](../2025/plots/20-Urbanization.png){group="2025-gallery" height="500"}
:::
:::::

## Resources
